title: Support first_match sequence operator
body:
## Summary

This patch adds support for the `first_match(sequence_expr)` operator in sequence expressions per IEEE 1800-2023 Section 16.9.8.

(SVA roadmap #7278, Part 2: Delay and Repetition).

## Reproducer

```systemverilog
module t(input clk);
  logic a, b;
  assert property (@(posedge clk) first_match(a or b) |-> (a | b));
endmodule
```

On master:
```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: Unsupported: first_match (in sequence expression)
```

## Changes

- `verilog.y`: Remove `BBUNSUP` for `yFIRST_MATCH '(' sexpr ')'` grammar rule (simple form). Update `BBUNSUP` message for `sequence_match_items` form to `"first_match with sequence_match_items"`.

## Test

- Added `test_regress/t/t_sequence_first_match.{v,py}` — CRC counter-based test with 6 assertions: boolean, OR, AND, nested, intersect, named sequence.
- Updated `test_regress/t/t_sequence_first_match_unsup.out` — regenerated (first_match errors removed; downstream errors now visible).
- Updated `test_regress/t/t_sequence_sexpr_unsup.out` — regenerated (simple first_match error removed; match-items form retained).

---
Developed by PlanV GmbH, assisted with Claude Code.

Reviewed by YilouWang.
